title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: Core contributor on the SDLC AI Solution team (15 engineers), building a code intelligence engine that extracts, organizes, and serves graph-based code context for AI-assisted development workflows.
achievements: Designed and maintained a scalable frontend architecture for a complex internal AI product.
Refactored key frontend modules to improve reusability, performance, and long-term maintainability.
Partnered with BA/PM stakeholders to define UX requirements and collaborated with backend engineers to integrate RESTful APIs and align service contracts.
Conducted code reviews to enforce engineering standards, improve code quality, and reduce defects across the team.
Investigated and resolved production issues while supporting recovery efforts for critical development-system incidents.
Containerized the application using Docker to streamline local development, onboarding, and deployment workflows.

title: Frontend Lead
description: Led the frontend modernization of a transportation billing system for a Japanese logistics client, migrating a legacy PowerBuilder desktop application to a modern web-based platform. Responsible for frontend architecture, codebase foundation, legacy system analysis, team leadership, and delivery quality throughout the development lifecycle.
achievements: Led a frontend team within a 12-member cross-functional project, providing technical direction and ensuring delivery quality.
Established and maintained the frontend architecture, codebase foundation, and development standards to support scalability and maintainability.
Analyzed and reverse-engineered legacy PowerBuilder application logic to facilitate system migration and ensure functional parity.
Designed reusable UI components and implemented user interfaces based on business requirements and design specifications.
Conducted code reviews and mentored team members to improve code quality, consistency, and engineering best practices.
Collaborated with stakeholders and development teams to clarify requirements, address technical challenges, and support project delivery.
Investigated and resolved development, testing, and production issues to maintain system stability and reliability.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Contributed to a teaching and learning English platform for Japanese learners, rebuilding legacy modules and delivering new features.
achievements: Developed responsive user interfaces for core learning workflows using Next.js 14.
Collaborated with UX/UI designers to transform designs into production-ready, reusable components.
Analyzed legacy systems and integrated backend APIs to support feature migration and new functionality.
Improved maintainability and performance through component standardization, code optimization, and reusable design patterns.
Performed browser compatibility testing, bug fixing, and production support throughout release cycles.
Participated actively in Agile ceremonies, including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Worked on an e-commerce fulfillment platform supporting end-to-end retailer operations through a sustainable and eco-friendly business model.
achievements: Implemented user interfaces and workflows based on approved design specifications and business requirements.
Collaborated with clients, product stakeholders, and designers to refine requirements and deliver sprint objectives.
Built reusable frontend modules and shared components to accelerate feature development and improve consistency.
Delivered enhancements, bug fixes, and iterative improvements to ensure product stability and release quality.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Developed logistics web applications focused on shipping-cost comparison, route visibility, and real-time delivery tracking.
achievements: Built a shipping comparison platform that enabled users to evaluate shipping costs and estimated delivery times across multiple logistics providers.
Translated client-approved designs into responsive, production-ready user interfaces and collaborated directly with stakeholders throughout the development lifecycle.
Developed a real-time delivery-tracking application for monitoring vehicle movements and shipment progress.
Integrated MQTT.js to enable real-time location updates and live tracking capabilities within the logistics workflow.
